summary: Maps OMNAI blueprint metaphors to governed Z-Sanctuary creative production equivalents. Blueprint is not product truth.
law: Blueprint ≠ product claim. Architecture metaphor ≠ AGI proof.

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Creative production routing score — ranks next internal step, lane, and evidence gaps; not a convergence proof or intelligence measure.
translations.allowed_use: Internal routing hints, backlog prioritisation for creative packs, AMK dashboard advisory text backed by receipts.
forbidden_claims: Public statement that a formula replaces human judgment
output_examples: Creative lane suggestion in Zuno Advisor context

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Specialist production lanes — discrete workflows (film, marketing, tool spec) with fixed checklists; not cloned autonomous minds.
translations.allowed_use: Template libraries, lane-specific validators, human-assigned roles in docs.
forbidden_claims: Thousands of autonomous agent entities acting without oversight
Unbounded parallel cognition as shipped product

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Four-track workflow: cognitive (intent), data (evidence), build (assets), oversight (safety and AMK indicators).
translations.allowed_use: Phase plans, RACI-style maps, internal factory diagrams.
forbidden_claims: Four spines as autonomous nervous system replacing governance
Spine as live production control without human charter
output_examples: Receipt tables tying evidence to build artefacts

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Eight quality and safety minibots — themed checks (claims, PII, licensing, accessibility, performance hints, link rot, tone, charter alignment).
translations.allowed_use: Read-only scripts, markdown reports, dashboard overlays where policy allows.
forbidden_claims: Autonomous enforcement or auto-merge from overseer output
Ant colony as literal multi-agent runtime in production
output_examples: Manual review checklist with eight sections

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Asset vault and folder conventions — versioned creative packs, manifests, and read-only indexes; not a claim of infinite storage or generation.
translations.allowed_use: Naming conventions, vault paths, export bundles under governance.
forbidden_claims: Automatic rights clearance for third-party IP

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Gated manual scripts — npm and PowerShell tasks run by operators with Turtle Mode and charter awareness; no silent fleet orchestration.
translations.allowed_use: Documented npm scripts, local validation, operator-run maintenance.
forbidden_claims: Fully autonomous cross-machine orchestration without approval

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Next-step planner plus reroute report — deterministic hints from JSON and docs; advisor, not executor.
translations.allowed_use: AMK Zuno Advisor Console copy, internal wizards, phase receipts.
forbidden_claims: Self-routing that applies patches or deploys
LLM-driven pathway without disclosed provider and charter
output_examples: AAL ladder hint JSON consumed read-only

translations.safe_z_equivalent: Future-gated capability flag in registries only — no active runtime, no public marketing of infinite capability.
translations.allowed_use: Roadmap placeholders, internal phase labels, charter-gated design notes.
forbidden_claims: Infinite intelligence or infinite power as shipped feature
Active infinite mode in production without DRP review
output_examples: Internal roadmap stub with no customer-facing copy
